meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use the Antigravity project template to overcome the no-portfolio trap. An Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is solved by shipping high-fidelity, production-ready AI applications. By leveraging the Antigravity project template paired with Claude Code, you bypass boilerplate fatigue, allowing you to focus on complex architecture, state management, and real-world scalability that impresses hiring managers and senior technical leads instantly.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank repository, the silence of your GitHub profile echoing the anxiety of the job market. Every recruiter asks for 'experience,' but you’re stuck in the endless cycle of tutorials that never result in a shippable product. The industry doesn't care about your certificates; they care about the systems you can architect.

Today, we break that cycle. By utilizing the Antigravity project template, you transition from a 'tutorial student' to an 'AI builder.' We will leverage Claude Code to accelerate your development, turning a weekend project into a portfolio piece that demonstrates professional-grade engineering and architectural maturity.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Establish the base project structure. This ensures type safety and optimized build pipelines from the first commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity production template with Next.js 15, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Include a pre-configured database schema for Supabase.

steps.title: Architect the AI Service Layer
steps.description: Abstract your AI logic into a modular service layer to ensure your backend remains decoupled from specific model providers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an AI service factory pattern in the /lib directory that handles streaming responses from Anthropic and OpenAI with unified error handling.

steps.title: Implement Robust State Management
steps.description: Manage UI state effectively using atomic patterns to prevent re-render bottlenecks common in complex AI interfaces.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up Zustand stores for chat history and real-time streaming state, ensuring persistence with local storage and sync capabilities.

steps.title: Integrate Edge Middleware
steps.description: Optimize performance by moving authentication and rate limiting to the edge.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Next.js middleware to protect API routes and implement a Redis-based rate limiter for the AI endpoint.

steps.title: Deploy to Production with Observability
steps.description: Ship your project with full logging to prove your ability to maintain production-grade systems.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add Vercel observability instrumentation and configure automated deployment workflows for the main branch.

pro_tips: Always commit your architectural decisions in the README; recruiters look for the 'why' behind your tech stack choices.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests for your AI service layer; 80% coverage on backend logic is a massive competitive advantage.
Implement a 'System Prompt' editor in your UI to demonstrate how you handle complex prompt engineering for end-users.
Include a 'Performance Audit' section in your repo, citing Lighthouse scores and latency metrics for your AI streaming.
Focus on one 'hero' feature that solves a specific, painful problem rather than building a generic AI wrapper.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, add a 'Case Study' README file documenting the challenges you faced and how you overcame them. Link this project in your LinkedIn featured section and reach out to one senior engineer for a code review.
content.conversion_block: Stop building tutorials and start shipping products. You have the tools, the template, and the roadmap to stand out in a saturated market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
